tree.name: Dario Saric
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: CHI traded Kevin Huerter and Dario Saric to DET; DET traded Jaden Ivey to CHI; MIN traded Mike Conley to CHI and a 2026 1st round draft pick swap to DET; MIN also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Jaden Ivey
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 5th overall by Detroit in the 2022 NBA Draft
